elements.title: lang::report_page_026_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       MAX(v.visits)      AS visits,
       MAX(v.timespend)   AS timespend,
       MAX(d.discussions) AS discussions,
       MAX(p.posts)       AS posts,
       COUNT(*)           AS total,
       tchr.teacher
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum kbi_f ON kbi_f.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lit.courseid, SUM(kbi_lit.timespend) as timespend, SUM(kbi_lit.visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit, mdl_course_modules kbi_cm, mdl_modules kbi_m
                  WHERE kbi_lit.page = 'module'
                    and kbi_cm.id = kbi_lit.param
                    and kbi_m.id = kbi_cm.module
                    and kbi_m.name = 'forum'
                  GROUP BY kbi_lit.courseid) v ON v.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, count(*) discussions FROM mdl_forum_discussions group by course) d ON d.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_fd.course, count(*) posts
                  FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd, mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp
                  WHERE kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
                  group by kbi_fd.course) p ON p.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) SEPARATOR ', ') AS teacher,
                         kbi_ctx.instanceid
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                         JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                  WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
                  GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid) tchr ON tchr.instanceid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
GROUP BY kbi_c.id, tchr.teacher
